jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at upGrad
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? upGrad in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About upGrad:
upGrad is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with upGrad!
